summary: Complete E2E testing of SEO features: Dynamic sitemap.xml, robots.txt, public categories endpoint, and category filter UI. All 17 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend features verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/sitemap.xml returns 200 with application/xml content type
Backend: Sitemap has valid <urlset> structure with <url> entries
Backend: Sitemap contains static pages: /, /trending-products, /pricing
Backend: Sitemap contains /trending/:slug product URLs (97+ product URLs)
Backend: GET /api/robots.txt returns 200 with text/plain content type
Backend: robots.txt contains Sitemap: directive pointing to sitemap.xml
Backend: robots.txt has Allow/Disallow rules (Allow: /, /trending-products; Disallow: /dashboard, /admin)
Backend: GET /api/public/categories returns 200 with array of categories
Backend: Categories have required fields: name, slug, count, avg_score
Backend: GET /api/public/trending-products returns 200 (no regression)
Backend: Products include category and slug fields for filtering/routing
Backend: GET /api/public/product/:slug returns 200 with category and related_products
Backend: Invalid slug returns 404
Frontend: /trending-products shows category filter strip with All button and 21 category buttons
Frontend: Category buttons show counts (e.g., Electronics (11), Beauty (8), Home Decor (9))
Frontend: Clicking a category filters the product grid (Beauty shows 2 products)
Frontend: /trending-products?category=Beauty pre-selects Beauty filter (highlighted)
Frontend: Product detail page has clickable category badge linking to /trending-products?category=X
Frontend: Related products on product detail link to /trending/:slug (internal linking working)
Frontend: Product cards display launch scores, margins, trend stages correctly

test_credentials.note: No authentication required - all tested endpoints are public

seed_data_creation: None - used existing product data (139 products in database)
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO features fully tested and working: (1) /api/sitemap.xml returns valid XML with 6 static pages + ~97 product URLs, (2) /api/robots.txt serves proper directives with Sitemap reference, (3) /api/public/categories returns 21 categories with name, slug, count, avg_score, (4) Frontend category filter on /trending-products works - clicking filters products client-side, (5) URL parameter ?category=X pre-selects the category, (6) Product detail pages have clickable category badges for internal linking, (7) Related products link to /trending/:slug pages. No mocked APIs in these features.

Dynamic Sitemap.xml.details: GET /api/sitemap.xml returns valid XML with <urlset> containing ~103 URLs (6 static pages + ~97 product pages). Proper XML structure with loc, lastmod, changefreq, priority.

robots.txt.details: GET /api/robots.txt returns proper text with User-agent: *, Allow/Disallow rules, and Sitemap directive pointing to /api/sitemap.xml. Also served from frontend at /robots.txt.

Public Categories Endpoint.details: GET /api/public/categories returns array of 21 categories with name, slug, count, avg_score. Categories include: Electronics (11), Home Decor (9), Beauty (8), Health & Fitness (8), etc.

Category Filter UI.details: Category filter strip on /trending-products shows All button + category buttons with counts. Clicking filters products client-side. URL parameter ?category=X pre-selects filter.

Internal Linking - Category Badges.details: Product detail pages (/trending/:slug) have clickable category badges that link to /trending-products?category=X for internal linking.

Internal Linking - Related Products.details: Related products section on product detail pages links to other /trending/:slug pages (e.g., Ring Doorbell links to Ring Camera product).

mocked_apis_note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints return real data from MongoDB
